flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at United States University rose 167% between 2006 and 2009 (36 → 96).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at United States University are 132% above 6-year earnings ($34.9k → $81.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at United States University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: For-profit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at United States University are 73% above the for-profit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($81.0k vs $46.9k).
